summary: Completed testing of Courses Platform and Vet Portal features. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: courses page with 25 courses (5 active + 20 coming_soon), course detail page with full module breakdown, vet portal registration form with all required fields, language selector (PT/EN/ES), and header navigation links.

issues: Page appears empty after vet registration - only shows footer. Dashboard content not implemented yet.
design_issues.priority: LOW - not part of current test scope

passed_tests: Course cards have price, hours, modules fields
Active course prices match expected values (R$4500, R$2800, R$3200, R$3800, R$2500)
POST /api/vet/register creates vet account with auto-approval
GET /api/vet/profile returns vet data with valid token
All vet registration fields stored correctly
Courses page (/cursos) loads with 5 active and 20 coming soon courses
Course cards show price, hours, modules count, discount badge
Course detail page shows full module breakdown
Vet Portal page shows registration form with all required fields
Vet registration form has: name, email, password, CRMV, state, area, specialties, education
Language selector (PT/EN/ES) visible and functional in header
seed_data_creation: Test vets created during testing with unique UUIDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Courses Platform and Vet Portal fully tested. Courses are hardcoded in COURSES list in server.py (not in MongoDB). Vet registration auto-approves and logs admin alert (MOCKED - no real email). Course enrollment is simulated (no real Stripe checkout for courses yet). The /vet-dashboard page is empty - only shows footer after registration.

test_credentials_used.test_vets: Created with unique UUIDs during testing
